title: Forward Deployed AI Operator
must_haves: Top graduate from a prestigious university with exceptional academic record (MEETS partially: 2:1 BA Leeds, not top-tier/elite)
Genuine intense interest in AI (MEETS: building AI agents with Claude Code since 2023)
End-to-end implementation/delivery for enterprise clients incl. on-site (PARTIAL/FAILS: community-led growth, no enterprise delivery)
hard_blockers: Enterprise client delivery / implementation experience not in CV (community-led GTM, not B2B enterprise delivery)
Prestigious-university/exceptional-academic gate (2:1 Business Management, Leeds — not elite-tier)
Domain: employee-benefits-admin enterprise SaaS, not crypto/Web3
met_strengths: Client-facing and stakeholder management via community/PR/investor work
one_line_verdict: FDE-style enterprise delivery role with an elite-academic gate and product/client-implementation core that doesn't match Ryan's community-led, crypto-rooted operator profile.
fetch_note: Confirmed open via WebSearch + euphoric.global/careers. Euphoric spun out of Peppy Health May 2025; AI-native benefits platform. Role = Forward Deployed Product/Engineer Associate sitting eng+product+client delivery. Remote-first with Central London hubs.
